nasb.text: Now on the sixth day they gathered twice as much bread, two omers for each one. When all the leaders of the congregation came and told Moses,

esv.text: On the sixth day they gathered twice as much bread, two omers each. And when all the leaders of the congregation came and told Moses,

cnv.text: 到第六日，他們收取了兩倍的食物，每人四公升；會眾的首領都來告訴摩西。

ccb.text: 到第六天，他们就拾取双倍的分量，也就是每人四升。会众的首领来禀告摩西，
